notes: this games deserves the gold badge and playable status

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (navi21, LLVM 15.0.7, DRM 3.57, 6.8.0-58-generic)
notes: Back when I started playing in Season 5, it worked perfectly on my Linux desktop. Then at the start of Season 6 it stopped being able to connect me to games with matchmaking on Linux. I've had some success playing it on Steam Deck, but as of now (the most recent patch) the game won't work on both my Linux Desktop and Steam Deck.
This game has a buggy matchmaking system but I'm convinced that the game doesn't work on Linux and optional online features like the account
